title: 事实调查与需求分析 / Fact Finding and Needs Analysis
summary: 事实调查的首要目标是识别客户的财务规划需求,量化每项需求总额、既有保障,从而得出仍待补足的“缺口”。需求分析则把保险需求与客户的具体处境联系起来。FAA-N16 要求代表做到“了解你的客户、进行需求分析、完整记录”,并使用 LIA 规定的人寿保险咨询表(MU 20/15 最低标准,2015-05-20)依序提问、分析后再作适当建议。 / The prime objective of fact-finding is to identify the client's financial-planning needs, quantify each need, existing provision and the resulting shortfall. Needs analysis links insurance needs to the client's specific situation. FAA-N16 requires reps to know the client, conduct needs analysis and keep proper records, using the LIA-prescribed Life Insurance Advisory Form (MU 20/15 minimum standard, 20 May 2015).

sections.heading: 事实调查的目标
sections.body: 事实调查的首要目标是识别客户在财务规划方面有哪些需求(如有)。良好的事实调查须汇集信息,使代表能量化每项需求总额、已有的保障,从而得出仍须补足的“缺口(shortfall)”金额。精准识别需求需要客户本人、家属、财务与就业状况的细节,以及现有健康/人寿保险与养老安排(包括适用的政府计划,如受养人保障计划 DPS、MediShield、CareShield Life 及 CPF 余额),并理解客户对未来的个人目标与愿望。此外还要识别客户可用于投资财务规划产品的可投入额——来自对各来源收入、支出、现有资本与负债的详细分析;正余额表明可用于财务规划的大致金额,无盈余则除非重排债务或削减开支否则难有作为。事实调查也要揭示跨人生阶段的预期变化(成家、置业、子女教育、加薪、继承、失业等)及其对未来供款的影响,并据客户最关切的需求与其商定资金分配优先序。即便客户主动来买某特定产品,也应做完整事实调查——“感知到的需求”可能与“真实需求”大相径庭。

sections.heading: Objectives of fact-finding
sections.body: The prime objective of fact-finding is to identify what financial-planning needs the client has, if any. Good fact-finding assembles information so the representative can quantify the total amount of each need, the provision that already exists, and hence the 'shortfall' still to be provided. This requires details of the client, dependants, finances and employment status, plus existing health/life insurances and pension provision — including government schemes where applicable such as the Dependants Protection Scheme, MediShield, CareShield Life and CPF balances — and an understanding of the client's aims and objectives. It also identifies the client's available contribution to invest, derived from a detailed analysis of income, outgoings, capital resources and liabilities: a positive balance indicates the likely amount available for planning. Fact-finding also uncovers anticipated life-stage changes (starting a family, buying a first home, a pay rise, an inheritance, unemployment) and helps clients set priorities. Even a client who comes to buy a specific product should be offered a full fact-find, because perceived needs can differ greatly from real needs.

sections.heading: 需求分析为何重要 / FAA-N16
sections.body: 人寿保险满足客户及其家庭在退休、患病或死亡时的财务安全这一关键需求,但这并非人们会自行识别的需求——他们往往不知如何评估自身处境或确定所需的保额与险种。需求分析正是让代表把对人寿保险的需要具体联系到客户处境的工具,据此“销售对应客户需求的产品”。根据《财务顾问法》(2001)《关于投资产品建议的通知》(FAA-N16),作出建议的代表须遵守三方面:(a)了解你的客户(know your client);(b)进行需求分析(conduct needs analysis);(c)完成文档与记录保存(documentation and record keeping)。这意味着须使用规定的人寿保险咨询表收集客户财务状况、需求、目标信息并经适当分析后,才作产品适合性建议。若客户不提供或提供不完整信息,可能影响建议的适合性。

sections.heading: Why needs analysis matters and FAA-N16
sections.body: Life insurance meets the vital need of financial security on retirement, ill-health or death, but it is not a need people identify for themselves — they often do not know how to evaluate their situation or determine the amount and types of cover required. Needs analysis is the tool that lets the representative relate the need for life insurance to the client's particular situation, so as to sell products that correspond to the client's needs. Under the Financial Advisers Act (2001) Notice on Recommendations on Investment Products (FAA-N16), reps making recommendations must comply with three aspects: (a) know your client; (b) conduct needs analysis; and (c) complete documentation and record keeping. A prescribed Life Insurance Advisory Form must be used to collect the client's financial situation, needs and objectives and put them through proper analysis before recommending product suitability. Incomplete information may affect the suitability of the recommendation.

sections.heading: 人寿保险咨询表与 LIA 指引
sections.body: 提问应尽量遵循人寿保险咨询表的顺序。各公司表格设计可不同,但须至少符合 MU 20/15 — LIA《人寿保险咨询流程最低标准》(2015-05-20 发布,生效不迟于 2015-04-01)。该指引适用于由获豁免及持牌财务顾问的代表向个人销售的人寿保险及意外与健康保险产品(不适用于个人意外险);对加保及后续保单变更若提供建议,客户确认无重大变化时可沿用先前信息。表格基本部分包括:财务顾问及代表的一般信息(含披露身份、强调提供充分信息的重要性)、“了解你的客户”(个人信息、优先级与目标、投资概况、现金流与预算、资产与负债、现有保险组合)、“需求分析”(应急资金、保障需求含意外与健康、投资与储蓄需求)、“代表的建议”、保单替换、代表声明、客户确认、主管复核。除产品类型特定的“第 4 节投资概况”外,须带客户走过每一节;客户不愿提供信息时须清楚记录其决定。“第 4a 节投资风险概况”在为有现金价值产品提供建议时须完成;“第 4b 节客户知识评估”在为非上市特定投资产品提供建议时须完成。每份表格须由代表与客户签署,并经主管复核与背书;主管不同意时须告知客户并作必要更正。

sections.heading: The Life Insurance Advisory Form and LIA guidelines
sections.body: As far as possible, follow the sequence of questions in the Life Insurance Advisory Form. Forms vary in design but must at minimum follow MU 20/15 — the LIA Minimum Standard for Life Insurance Advisory Process (dated 20 May 2015; effective no later than 1 April 2015). The guidelines apply to life insurance and accident and health insurance (but not personal accident insurance) sold to individuals by FA reps of exempt and licensed advisers; for top-ups and subsequent alterations where advice is given, reps may rely on previously provided information if the client confirms no material changes. Basic sections include general information on the FA and rep status, 'know your client' (personal information, priorities and objectives, investment profile, cash flow and budget, assets and liabilities, existing insurance portfolio), 'needs analysis' (emergency funds, protection including accident and health, investment and savings needs), 'representative's recommendation', replacement of policy, declaration by the rep, client acknowledgement and supervisor's review. Except for 'Section 4 – Investment Profile' (product-type specific), you must take the client through every section, documenting any decision not to provide information. Section 4a (Investment Risk Profile) must be completed for products with cash value; Section 4b (Client Knowledge Assessment) for Unlisted Specified Investment Products. Every form must be signed by rep and client and reviewed/endorsed by the supervisor.

sections.heading: 个人信息:个人/就业/受养人/陪同
sections.body: 个人详情包括姓名与称谓、身份证号、出生日期/年龄、性别、婚姻状况与吸烟习惯;吸烟状态与年龄对核保与保费厘定至关重要。就业详情揭示客户受雇/自雇、全职/兼职:受雇者若公司提供病假福利,其期限决定收入保障保单的等待期(如公司给六个月病假,客户可买六个月等待期的保单,保费较低);自雇者须自第一天起自行承担;失业无收入者暂可能无法购买。注意 CPF:兼职/临时雇员月薪超过 $50 也须缴 CPF,故可能受 CPF 保险计划覆盖。还应问预期退休年龄,以确定积累退休金的年限。受养人:若客户希望将受养人纳入需求分析,需提供配偶/伴侣、子女、亲属(如父母)、其他人的姓名/关系、年龄、性别与需供养年数;受养人越多、供养年限越长,所需人寿与收入保障越多。供养年数估算:子女用 25 减当前年龄(男孩)、22 减当前年龄(女孩),即完成高等教育之龄;父母/其他受养人用预期寿命(女 80、男 75)再按经验加 8 年。陪同(信任个人):客户若属以下三项中任意两项——年满 62 岁、英语口/笔不流利、中学及以下学历——表格建议由“信任个人(Trusted Individual)”陪同;信任个人须至少 18 岁、至少 GCE‘N’或‘O’水准或同等学历、英语流利且获客户信任。陪同非强制行业惯例,由客户自行选择。

sections.heading: Personal information: personal, employment, dependants, accompaniment
sections.body: Personal details cover name and salutation, NRIC number, date of birth/age, gender, marital status and smoking habit; smoking status and age are essential for underwriting and premium determination. Employment details reveal employed/unemployed and self-employed/full-time/part-time status: an employer's sick-leave period sets the appropriate waiting period for an income-protection policy (e.g. six months' medical leave allows a six-month waiting period at lower premium), while the self-employed must provide from day one and the unemployed may be unable to buy now. Note CPF: part-time/casual employees earning over $50 a month must also contribute, so may be covered under CPF insurance schemes. Ask the intended retirement age to determine years available to accumulate retirement funds. Dependants: if the client wants them considered, provide name/relationship, age, sex and years of support for spouse/partner, children, relatives (e.g. parents) and others; more dependants and longer support periods mean more life and income protection. Years to support: for children, subtract current age from 25 (boys) or 22 (girls) — the age of completing tertiary education; for parents/others, use life expectancy (females 80, males 75) plus a rule-of-thumb eight years. Accompaniment: where the client meets any two of — aged 62 or above, not proficient in spoken/written English, secondary education or below — the form recommends a 'Trusted Individual', who must be at least 18, hold at least GCE 'N'/'O' Level or equivalent, be proficient in English, and have the client's trust. Accompaniment is not compulsory and is the client's option.

sections.heading: 优先级与目标;投资概况
sections.body: 优先级与目标:客户就应急资金、保障(死亡、全残 TPD、危疾、意外与健康如个人意外/住院/门诊/因病失能/牙科)、储蓄与投资(退休、大额计划支出如子女教育/置业)各项标注高/中/低优先级,据此推荐合适产品并协助排序。投资概况(产品类型特定):投资风险概况(为有现金价值产品提供建议时须完成)——风险与回报存在权衡,回报越高风险越大;短期政府债券或银行存款几乎无风险,股票短期结果很不确定但潜在回报更高,故股票适合愿承受大额亏损以博高资本利得的风险偏好者,银行存款适合保守的风险厌恶者。代表须解释四类人群特征与风险回报关系,请客户在 1–4 刻度上自评。客户知识评估(为非上市特定投资产品 SIP 提供建议时须完成):评估客户金融知识与经验,若不理解非上市 SIP(如底层为衍生品的 ILP,即 SIP-ILP)的风险与特征,则不得独立购买;只需满足三项标准之一即通过——(C)持会计/精算/商业/资本市场/金融/保险等文凭或更高学历,或 CFA/ACCA;(D)过去三年内在集合投资计划(如单位信托)或 ILP 中交易至少六次;(E)过去 10 年内在投资产品的开发/结构/管理/销售/交易/研究/分析或培训方面有至少连续三年工作经验(会计、精算、资金或财务风险管理经验亦算相关)。

sections.heading: Priorities and objectives; investment profile
sections.body: Priorities and objectives: the client marks High/Medium/Low priority for emergency funds; protection (death, total permanent disability, critical illness, accident and health such as personal accident, hospitalisation, outpatient, loss of income due to sickness, dental); and savings & investments (retirement, large planned expenses such as children's education and home purchase) — enabling suitable recommendations and prioritisation. Investment profile (product-type specific): Investment Risk Profile (required for products with cash value) — there is a risk-return trade-off; short-term government securities or bank deposits carry little or no risk, equities are very uncertain short-term but offer higher potential returns, so equities suit risk-seekers prepared to accept substantial losses for high capital gains, while bank deposits suit risk-averse, cautious clients. The rep explains the four groups and the risk-return relationship and asks the client to self-grade on a 1–4 scale. Client Knowledge Assessment (required for Unlisted Specified Investment Products): if the client does not understand the risks and features of an unlisted SIP (e.g. ILPs whose underlying funds are derivatives — SIP-ILPs), he may not purchase independently. He passes by satisfying just ONE of three criteria — (C) a diploma or higher in fields such as accountancy, actuarial science, business, capital markets, finance, insurance, or CFA/ACCA; (D) at least six transactions in a CIS (e.g. unit trust) or ILP in the last three years; or (E) at least three consecutive years' work experience in the past 10 years in the development, structuring, management, sale, trading, research, analysis of, or training in investment products (accountancy, actuarial science, treasury or financial-risk-management experience also counts).

sections.heading: 现金流与预算;资产与负债
sections.body: 现金流与预算(客户可选择是否纳入):需找出估计的年总收入、年总支出与任何盈余/缺口。当前支出用于计算客户早逝后家庭维持所需收入水平(不计其他收入来源)。税前收入有助确定收入保障保额,如收入保障最高覆盖收入的 75%。支出信息揭示每月财务义务并估算可用于储蓄与缴保费的资金。还须问未来 12 个月内是否有显著增减收支的计划或因素(如继承、借款投资、购度假屋),并核实预留预算是否占资产或盈余的相当比例,以防未来无法续缴保费。资产与负债(客户可选择是否纳入):LIA 表格将资产分为个人用途资产、投资、CPF 与其他资产,按当前市值计;流动资产指一年内可轻易变现的现金及近现金(支票/储蓄账户、定存、货币市场工具),供当前与应急之用,而非退休等长期用途;应急资金指为重大意外支出(如保险未覆盖的医疗费、失业造成的意外收入损失)预留之款。个人用途资产为持用消费(新加坡主要为房屋与汽车),不为产生收入;投资资产(股票、债券等)旨在产生收入/资本增值,可供遗属在早逝/伤残时动用。负债指欠债权人之款(房贷、车贷、信用卡、有/无抵押贷款、分期付款、银行透支等),提供债务偿还需求规模。资产减负债为净资产头寸;负净资产即视为破产。但净资产头寸本身揭示有限——客户净资产可观却可能全数压在不产生收入的房屋汽车等资产上;它只是总资产与总负债之差的“残值”,会随时间增减。

sections.heading: Cash flow and budget; assets and liabilities
sections.body: Cash flow and budget (client's option): find estimated total annual income, total annual expenses and any surplus/shortfall. Current expenditure is used to calculate the income the family needs to survive on the client's premature death, ignoring other breadwinners' income. Pre-tax income helps determine income-protection cover, e.g. up to a maximum of 75% of income. Expenditure shows monthly obligations and estimates funds available for savings and premiums. Ask about plans or factors in the next 12 months that may significantly raise or lower income/expenditure (inheritance, borrowing for investment, buying a holiday home), and check whether the budgeted amount is a substantial portion of assets/surplus, signalling a risk of not sustaining premiums. Assets and liabilities (client's option): the LIA form classifies assets into personal-use assets, investments, CPF and other assets, valued at current market value; liquid assets are cash and near-cash readily convertible within a year (checking/savings accounts, fixed deposits, money-market instruments) for current and emergency use, not long-term purposes like retirement; emergency funds cover major unexpected expenses (uninsured medical costs, job-loss income). Personal-use assets are held for use and consumption (mainly houses and cars in Singapore), not income production; investments (shares, bonds) produce income/capital growth and are available to survivors. Liabilities are debts owed to creditors (mortgage, car loans, credit cards, secured/unsecured loans, hire purchase, overdrafts). Assets minus liabilities gives the net asset position; a negative net asset position means the client is considered bankrupt. Net worth reveals little on its own — a sizeable net asset position may be tied up in non-income-producing assets; it is merely a residual that can rise or fall over time.

sections.heading: 现有保险组合与需求分析
sections.body: 现有保险组合(客户可选择是否纳入):须按保单类型(如终身/定期)、被保人、利益类型、单缴/期缴、保障金额、满期/到期年份汇总,显示既有保单在死亡、伤残、退休方面对需求的满足程度,作为进一步建议的参考起点;应提醒客户纳入雇主提供的保单及以 CPF、SRS 购买的保单。表 2.1 说明各项信息用途:保单类型/利益与被保人——衡量保额并检视充足性与适当性、提示客户对保险态度与未来需求;单缴/期缴——便利现金流规划、评估保费负担相对收入;满期/到期年份——提示退休/子女教育等资金来源及可用时点。对收入保障保险,尤须比较保额与当前收入水平、保单是否覆盖至预期退休年龄、给付前的递延期长度。需求分析:确定客户要规划的需求并逐项算出“所需总额—既有保障=应规划金额”;需求分三大类——保障(死亡、伤残、危疾)、储蓄与投资(退休、储蓄/投资、子女教育)、意外与健康(个人意外、住院、门诊、因病失能、老年残疾、牙科)。遗产规划亦是上升中的需求,涵盖立遗嘱、CPF 提名、设立持久授权书(LPA)、订立预先护理计划(ACP)。

sections.heading: Existing insurance portfolio and needs analysis
sections.body: Existing insurance portfolio (client's option): summarise by policy type (e.g. whole life/term), insured, benefits type, single/regular premium, benefit amount and maturity/expiry year, showing how far existing plans meet needs on death, disability and retirement, as a reference point for further recommendations; remind the client to include employer-provided policies and policies bought under CPF and SRS. Table 2.1 explains the purposes: policy type/benefits and insured measure sum assured and benefits, help examine adequacy and appropriateness, and give clues about attitude and future needs; single/regular premium facilitates cash-flow planning and evaluates premium burden relative to income; maturity/expiry year shows sources and timing of funds for retirement, children's education, etc. For disability income insurance, compare cover with current income, check whether the policy covers up to the anticipated retirement age, and note the deferred period before benefits are payable. Needs analysis: determine which needs to plan for and, for each, work out total amount needed minus existing benefits to derive the amount to plan for; the three categories are protection (death, disability, critical illness), savings and investment (retirement, savings/investment, children's education), and accident and health (personal accident, hospitalisation, outpatient, loss of income due to sickness, old-age disabilities, dental). Legacy planning is a rising need, covering making a will, CPF nomination, a Lasting Power of Attorney (LPA) and an Advance Care Plan (ACP).

sections.heading: 代表的建议、产品风险与代表责任
sections.body: 代表的建议须列明:客户目标(关切、投资目标、缺口金额、时间跨度、投资风险概况,以及所用假设如预期回报率、通胀率——须披露);推荐计划(计划与附约全名、期限、保额、保费/频率、基金名称、投资额及风险分类);推荐理由(说明计划如何满足需求、解释产品特征与利益);风险/限制(产品可能风险、基于客户情形的可能不利);偏离理由(如保费超预算、所荐基金风险高于客户偏好、客户自选产品/基金与所荐不同)。产品风险按资本损失高低:较低——年金、储蓄险、货币市场证券(国库券、SSB、银行承兑、存单、商业票据、回购、银行存款)、终身寿险;低到高——固定收益证券(债券)、ILP/结构性人寿保险产品(视底层资产/机制)、单位信托/ETF、万用寿险;较高——衍生工具(期权、期货)、股票(普通/优先股)。建议健康险时须注意 MAS 通知 120(意外与健康保险的披露与建议流程要求)与 MAS 通知 117(健康保险培训与胜任要求)。代表责任:须基于咨询表所得信息进行妥善需求分析后再作适合建议,并解释与清楚记录建议依据(产品性质与目标、关键风险及期限、费用等特征);须对客户信息保密,未经事先同意不得披露,除非涉保险申请或有公共职责/法律/专业披露义务;若须更正已提交的表格,须及时告知客户并作必要更正。

sections.heading: Representative's recommendation, product risk and rep responsibilities
sections.body: The recommendation states: client objectives (concerns, investment objectives, shortfall amount, time horizon, risk profile, and assumptions such as expected rate of return and inflation, which must be disclosed); plan recommendation (full name of plan and rider, duration, sum assured, premium/frequency, fund names, investment amount and risk classification); reasons (how the plan meets the need, and features/benefits); risks/limitations (possible risks and disadvantages given the client's circumstances); and reasons for deviation (premiums exceed budget, recommended funds are higher risk than the client's preference, or the client's choice differs from the recommended plan/funds). Product risk of capital loss: lower — annuities, endowment policies, money-market securities (T-bills, Singapore Savings Bonds, banker's acceptance, certificate of deposit, commercial paper, repos, bank deposits), whole life; low to high — fixed-income securities (bonds), ILPs/structured life insurance products (depending on underlying), unit trusts/ETFs, universal life; higher — derivatives (options, futures) and equities (ordinary and preferred shares). When recommending health insurance, note MAS Notice 120 (Disclosure and Advisory Process Requirements for Accident and Health Insurance Products) and MAS Notice 117 (Training and Competency Requirement: Health Insurance). Rep responsibilities: conduct proper needs analysis from the form before a suitable recommendation, and explain and document its basis (nature and objective of the product, key risks, duration, fees); treat client information confidentially and not disclose it without prior consent unless for an insurance application or where there is a public duty or legal/professional obligation; and, where rectification of a submitted form is needed, promptly inform the client and rectify.

sections.heading: 事实调查技能:倾听、积极倾听、提问
sections.body: 面谈应让客户感到非威胁,不可变成制造焦虑或厌烦的审问。所需软技能为倾听与提问。倾听:绝对专注于客户实际所说以准确记录,避免准备不足而忙于想下一问;须理解客户原意,不可凭经验臆断其需求/意图/感受;可通过核实客户措辞含义、留意语气与语调来避免误解;积极倾听须辅以积极观察(肢体语言往往比措辞更能反映感受与兴趣)。Dr Thomas Gordon(师从 Carl Rogers)指出良好倾听须满足三条件——接纳(acceptance)、同理(empathy)、真诚(genuineness);且接纳不是同意,同理不是同情,真诚不是敏感。积极倾听是专注于说话者言语与非言语沟通,用言语/非言语反馈表明真正理解,帮助信息更有效传递并预判与满足客户未表达的需求。提问:开放式问题求意见/感受/想法、答案详尽;封闭式问题求是/否或简短事实、用于需要特定信息并能让对话简短。问题排序:对健谈客户多用封闭式以控制对话,对内向客户先用封闭式待其放松后转开放式,对不悦/愤怒客户先用开放式让其宣泄、待平静后转封闭式以聚焦。中立问题无偏向、鼓励准确回答;引导性问题措辞诱导对方给出某既定(通常支持提问者立场)的答案。表格收集的数据本身不能决定推荐何种产品与保额,代表须从数据分析需求、把客户处境与建议相连,以体现“增值”。

sections.heading: Skills in fact finding: listening, active listening, questioning
sections.body: Keep the interview non-threatening; do not let it become an interrogation that creates anxiety or boredom. The soft skills required are listening and questioning. Listening: concentrate absolutely on what the client actually says so it can be recorded accurately, rather than thinking of the next question; understand the client's meaning and avoid assumptions; check what an expression means and listen to tone and inflection; supplement active listening with active observing of body language. Per Dr Thomas Gordon (who studied with Carl Rogers), good listening requires three conditions — acceptance, empathy and genuineness — where acceptance is not agreement, empathy is not sympathy, and genuineness is not sensitivity. Active listening focuses solely on the speaker's verbal and non-verbal communication, using feedback to show understanding, helping transfer information effectively and anticipating the client's unexpressed needs; a lazy listener overlooks clues to unspoken concerns. Questioning: open questions seek opinions, feelings or thoughts and detailed answers; closed questions require yes/no or short factual answers and suit specific information, keeping conversation short. Sequencing: use more closed questions to control a talkative client; with a quiet client start closed then move to open; with an unhappy/angry client start open to vent, then move to closed to focus. Neutral questions carry no bias and encourage accurate answers; leading questions are phrased to encourage a particular answer supporting the questioner's position. The data alone cannot decide what products and how much cover to recommend — the rep must analyse needs and link circumstances to recommendations to demonstrate added value.

sections.heading: 七大事实调查关注领域
sections.body: 分析数据以确定需求时,应聚焦七个领域(彼此互补、非互斥):(a)人生阶段——初入职场/年轻未婚、年轻已婚/有子女、有较大子女、供养年迈父母、临退休、退休;各阶段典型需求不同,如临退休投资期短宜选波动较小工具、退休须保全积蓄并保持流动性。(b)就业状况与职业——受雇者多有团体定期/住院手术保险及 CPF 受养人保障计划等既有安排,自雇者安排很少或没有,故自雇者对寿险/伤残/医疗险需求更大;职业涉及意外风险或健康危害(如石棉沉着病)会加大收入保障需求,提前退休职业(如警察)积累期更短须尽早储蓄。(c)受养人——据关系、年龄性别、需供养年数判断是否需保障及保在客户还是受养人身上;为受养人投保时应尽量附加“缴款人利益附约(payor's benefit rider)”,使客户身故/伤残时保单不致失效。(d)财务状况——盈余客户看其愿留多少缴保费,赤字客户检视支出可否削减或改用 CPF;资产可减少所需保险并使规划起步更晚,负债(房贷、车贷、信用卡)身故时须偿付否则拖累遗属,可用各类定期险如递减定期房贷险,应优先偿付高息债务。

sections.heading: Seven areas of fact find to focus on (part 1)
sections.body: When analysing data to determine needs, focus on seven complementary (not mutually exclusive) areas: (a) Life stage — fresh entrant/young unmarried, young married/with children, married with older children, supporting aged parents, pre-retirement, retirement; typical needs differ, e.g. pre-retirement has a short horizon favouring less volatile instruments, and retirement requires preserving savings and liquidity. (b) Employment status and occupation — the employed often have Group Term, Hospital & Surgical cover and the CPF Dependants' Protection Scheme already in place, while the self-employed may have little or none, so the self-employed have greater need for life/disability/medical insurance; occupations with accidental risk or health hazards (e.g. asbestosis) increase income-protection needs, and early-retirement jobs (e.g. police officer) shorten the saving period. (c) Dependants — from relationship, age/gender and years of support, decide whether cover is needed and on whose life; when insuring a dependant, attach a payor's benefit rider where allowed so the policy does not lapse on the client's death or disability. (d) Financial position — for surplus clients check how much they will set aside for premiums; for deficit clients review expenditure for cuts or use of CPF; assets can reduce insurance needed and allow a later start, while liabilities (mortgage, car, credit cards) must be repaid on death (e.g. via Mortgage Decreasing Term Insurance), prioritising high-interest debt.

sections.heading: 七大领域(续):现有保险、投资偏好、目标
sections.body: (e)现有保险组合——检视以判断客户是否过度/不足投保、保单期限是否适当、可否加附约增保省费;现有人寿组合包括 CPF 各计划(DPS、MediShield、CareShield Life)、SRS 与雇员福利。MediShield Life 于 2015-11-01 取代 MediShield,由 CPF 局管理,覆盖全体新加坡公民与永久居民的大额住院及部分昂贵门诊(如癌症、洗肾)。CareShield Life 是全国长期护理保险,在严重残疾时提供月度给付,覆盖 1980 年及以后出生的公民与 PR,保费可全数由 MediSave 支付。雇员福利随转职变动、失业即止,纳入需求分析有风险,宜分含/不含团体保险两种情景供客户选择;团体定期保险离职即终止,储蓄型可能数年内满期,均会减少保额。死亡保障须确保保额正确(过低致遗属困难,过高则资金本可更优配置);医疗险按实报实销,危疾/生存保障给付一笔款应急。(f)投资偏好——从数据确认客户风险承受度;但仅知风险概况与偏好不足以推荐最适产品,还须了解目标。(g)优先级与目标——分析三因素:目标是短期还是长期(影响产品类型)、为客户自身还是为他人(如子女/孙辈)、优先级高低(以排定需求优先序);须帮客户辨明并排序需求,并确保所需保费不超预算(表格中客户须指明预算保费是否占资产/盈余相当比例,若“是”示警可能负担不起)。

sections.heading: Seven areas (continued): existing insurance, investment preferences, objectives
sections.body: (e) Existing insurance portfolio — review to assess whether the client is over- or under-insured, whether terms are appropriate, and whether riders can add cover and save cost; the existing life portfolio includes CPF schemes (DPS, MediShield, CareShield Life), SRS and employee benefits. MediShield Life replaced MediShield from 1 Nov 2015, is administered by the CPF Board, and covers all Singapore Citizens and PRs for large hospital bills and selected costly outpatient treatments (e.g. cancer, dialysis). CareShield Life is a national long-term-care scheme paying monthly support on severe disability, covering citizens and PRs born in 1980 onwards, with premiums fully payable from MediSave. Employee benefits vary with job changes and stop on unemployment, so including them in needs analysis carries risk — present scenarios with and without group cover; Group Term ends on leaving employment and endowments may mature in a few years, reducing cover. Ensure the death cover amount is correct (under-insurance causes hardship; over-insurance wastes funds). Medical insurance pays on reimbursement; critical-illness/living-assurance pays a lump sum. (f) Investment preferences — confirm risk tolerance from the data, but knowing the risk profile alone is insufficient; objectives must also be understood. (g) Priorities and objectives — analyse three factors: short- vs long-term (affects product type), for the client or for others (e.g. children/grandchildren), and level of priority (to rank needs); help the client identify and prioritise needs and ensure premiums do not exceed budget (the form asks whether the budgeted premium is a substantial portion of assets/surplus — a 'Yes' signals a possible affordability risk).

sections.heading: 结构化面谈
sections.body: 正常事实调查面谈遵循既定结构,通常历经:让客户舒适放松;说明事实调查流程及其目的;信息收集环节;讨论优先级与客户个人关切;就代表报告将处理的主要问题原则上达成一致。代表可能须在客户设定的预算内准备建议,或无成本约束。面谈可在代表办公室、客户处所或客户家中进行。面谈后代表离场作更全面分析、必要时寻求专家指导,从而确立客户量化需求、识别满足各需求的合适产品、评估涉及成本,据以在后续会面提出最终建议。结构化面谈的价值:对双方而言——为客户准备事实调查流程、助其从事实信息转向识别自身优先需求、把成本置于规划需求与其他支出的语境中;并确保代表收齐必要信息、逐阶段处理、在冗长过程中维持客户兴趣、为双方带来整体统一性。面谈所揭信息会被记录,构成客户与代表双方记录,防止记忆疏漏并提供建议依据的证据,出现日后争议时对双方均有保护。常见记录形式为结构化问卷,亦可不经正式面谈而填写。注意:在新加坡人口老龄化趋势下,购买产品者可能是客户的受托人(客户的照护者、受赠人即遗产执行人或为未成年受益人设立基金的遗嘱信托人),此时由受托人确定产品适合性,代表的职责是向受托人推荐产品的适合性;因受托人为受益人保管资金,产品整体风险概况应为低,若受托人对其受信责任不安,把资金留在储蓄存款而非承担产品风险可能更佳。

sections.heading: The structured interview
sections.body: A normal fact-finding interview follows a prepared structure, typically: making the client comfortable and relaxed; explaining the fact-finding process and its purpose; the information-gathering session; discussing priorities and personal concerns; and agreeing in principle the main problems to be addressed by the rep's report. The rep may need to work within a client-fixed budget or face no cost constraints. The interview may take place at the rep's office, the client's premises or home. Afterwards the rep carries out a more comprehensive analysis, seeks specialist guidance if needed, establishes the client's quantified needs, identifies appropriate products and assesses costs, then finalises recommendations for a subsequent meeting. Value: for both parties it prepares the client, helps move from facts to priority needs, and places costs in the context of planning needs and other expenditure; it ensures the rep collects all necessary information, processes it stage by stage, maintains the client's interest through a lengthy process, and brings unity to the whole. Information revealed is recorded as part of both parties' records, protecting against memory lapses and providing proof of the basis of recommendations in any future dispute. The usual record is a structured questionnaire, which can be completed without a formal interview. Note: with Singapore's ageing population, the purchaser may be the client's trustee (a caregiver, or a donee — executor of an estate or testamentary trustee of a fund for a minor beneficiary); the trustee then determines product suitability and the rep recommends suitability to the trustee. Because the trustee safeguards funds for the beneficiary, the entire product risk profile should be low, and the trustee may be better off leaving funds in savings deposits than taking on product risk if uncomfortable in a fiduciary capacity.

keyPoints: 首要目标=量化每项需求总额、既有保障与缺口;即便客户来买特定产品也须做完整事实调查 / Quantify each need, existing provision and the shortfall; offer a full fact-find even to a product buyer
FAA-N16 三要求:了解你的客户、进行需求分析、完整文档与记录 / FAA-N16: know your client, conduct needs analysis, documentation and record keeping
LIA MU 20/15 最低标准(2015-05-20);除产品特定的第4节投资概况外须走过每一节;4a/4b 触发条件 / LIA MU 20/15; cover every section except Section 4; Section 4a/4b triggers
受养人供养年数:男孩 25-当前龄、女孩 22-当前龄;父母用预期寿命(女80/男75)+8年 / Years to support: boys 25−age, girls 22−age; parents life expectancy (F80/M75)+8
信任个人:满足三项(≥62岁/英语不流利/中学及以下)中任意两项即建议陪同 / Trusted Individual recommended if the client meets any two of three profiles
收入保障最高覆盖收入的75%;负净资产=视为破产 / Income protection up to 75% of income; negative net worth = considered bankrupt
客户知识评估三标准(学历/六次交易/三年经验)满足其一即通过 / Client Knowledge Assessment: satisfy any one of three criteria
MediShield Life 自2015-11-01取代MediShield;CareShield Life覆盖1980年及以后出生者 / MediShield Life from 1 Nov 2015; CareShield Life covers those born 1980 onwards
七大关注领域:人生阶段、就业/职业、受养人、财务状况、现有保险、投资偏好、目标 / Seven areas of fact find
良好倾听三条件(Gordon):接纳≠同意、同理≠同情、真诚≠敏感 / Good listening: acceptance, empathy, genuineness
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.22 — Fact Finding and Needs Analysis (SCI, Version 1.1); FAA-N16; LIA MU 20/15
